common.tagline: German exam prep — Goethe, telc, ÖSD, TestDaF, ECL

landing.headline: German exam prep, focused.
landing.subhead: Practice Lesen, Hören, Schreiben, and Sprechen for Goethe, telc, ÖSD, TestDaF and ECL — with AI feedback aligned to the official rubrics.
landing.appBody: DeutschFit is a mobile app for learners preparing for German-language certification exams. The app is currently in closed beta on TestFlight (iOS) and Internal App Sharing (Android).
landing.footer: © 2026 DeutschFit. Operated by Jordan Moyo (Douala, Cameroon). DeutschFit and SmartlyDataSense are unregistered trade names.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: All prices in XAF, taxes included.
pricing.antiSteeringNote: Subscriptions are activated manually after out-of-band payment. See payment instructions.
pricing.loadError: Plans are temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.

payinfo.title: How to pay
payinfo.intro: Pick the channel that suits you. Pay the exact XAF amount, then email proof of payment. We activate your plan within 24 hours.
payinfo.comingSoon: Coming soon — this channel isn't configured yet.
payinfo.momoBody: Send the exact XAF amount to {number}. Use your account email as the reference.
payinfo.omBody: Send the exact XAF amount to {number}. Use your account email as the reference.
payinfo.bankNote: SWIFT fees borne by the sender.
payinfo.paypalBody: Send to {handle} as Friends & Family if your country supports it; otherwise add 4% to cover fees.
payinfo.proofBody: Send proof of payment to {email} with the screenshot or transaction ID. We activate within 24 hours.
